text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to meet Seiun Sky today to
celebrate the new year, but...

I'm used to her flakiness by now, so I decide to
start looking for her. As I'm about to leave...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pardon me!

Nishino Flower makes a courteous entrance. If
memory serves, she talks with Sky often.
choice_data_list: Are you okay? Why are you by yourself?
Are you okay? Why are you by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: By myself?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Seriously, Sky?!

Nishino Flower goes into the hallway, then drags
a familiar face back inside.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Sup.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We have to do a proper greeting, Sky! Ready,
set...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! S-Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, sorry, sorry.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're just so cute with all that pep. ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hrngh... Please don't tease me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's try again, okay? Ready, set!

text_block_list.name: Flower and Sei
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year!
Happy New Yeeear.

When I speak with Nishino Flower later, I find out
that she saw Seiun Sky napping in the courtyard,
inferred what was going on, then brought her
over.

Unsurprisingly, it turns out Sky was planning to
ditch. As I wonder what the heck I should do with
her...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um! Sky's not a bad person!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: F-Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She's just a little lazy, that's all. I don't think she
was planning to skip today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll help out, so please continue to take
good care of her.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll see you later, Sky. Good luck today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. Thanks.

Nishino Flower gives a quick, courteous bow,
then leaves. She reminds me to "keep Sky out of
trouble."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Why don't you just come out with it? I can see
on your face you've got something to say.
choice_data_list:
I was thinking about how kind Nishino Flower
is...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second! Now you look like you're plotting
something!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This isn't gonna happen every time, you know? I
just came along with her today because she was
so insistent.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So don't even think about using Flower or
anything. And don't read too much into this! Just
don't!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's go! We've got a meeting to do,
right?
choice_data_list: How about a cup of tea for our meeting?
Tell me more about Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! But it's New Year's Day!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's tyranny, I say! I'm not gonna lift a finger on
New Year's!
choice_data_list: You don't have a say in this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Don't tell me you're actually peeved that I
wasn't gonna show up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're clearly upset!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, you're pretty scary when you're mad,
just like Grass...

And so, our new year is off to a running start as
training with Seiun Sky kicks off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's a great idea! I'll make the tea.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why are you all shocked? Even I can brew
tea.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...To escape awkward situations.

Maybe it's because she was trying to skip today,
or because of how Nishino Flower exposed her...

But for whatever reason, Seiun Sky brews our tea
for once.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No way! I'd never mess up the tea that
bad—blegh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Like what?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just on campus—wait a second. Why do you
wanna know this?!
choice_data_list:
I want to know why you're being so
well-behaved.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey! I'm always well-behaved!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, this conversation's over! Finito! It's closing
time! Adios!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm not running, I'm walking away.

And so, a brief game of tag takes place inside my
office.
